name: GT-Pprops
source: proofs/lem-P-properties (VALIDATED prior lemma, export.md) — available facts: P^2=P, P(1)=1, P real-linear on B(H)_sa, delta:=||P-Phi||<=C eta, ||P||<=1+C eta, ||Phi||=1 (HOS-grounded), ||Phi^2-Phi||<=eta (def-almost-idempotent), delta-positivity (a>=0 => P(a)>=-delta||a|| 1).
